name: burial room
hints: The burial room has a fearsome mummy, a tapestry treasure, and burning tanna leaves.
The mummy is dangerous! The tanna leaves keep it calm. Don't take them away carelessly.
GET TAP for the Antique Tapestry treasure. Be careful of the mummy.
The mummy follows the tanna leaves. Use the pistol if threatened (SHO MUM). N=passageway (9), S=tall room (11), U=sarcophagus (7).
notes: Burial room with mummy (dangerous!), tapestry treasure, and tanna leaves. Mummy follows the leaves. Hub room: N=passageway (9), S=tall room (11), U=sarcophagus (7).
